formulas.name: Democracy Index
formulas.formula: DI = (E + P + F + PEE + C + PPE) / 60
formulas.variables: E = Electoral Process, P = Functioning of Government, F = Political Participation, PEE = Political Culture, C = Civil Liberties, PPE = Political Engagement and Participation Evaluation
formulas.notes: To evaluate the quality of democracy in South Asian countries

formulas.name: Human Development Index (HDI)
formulas.variables: LEI = Life Expectancy Index, EI = Education Index, II = Income Index
formulas.notes: To measure the human development of South Asian countries

formulas.name: Gini Coefficient
formulas.variables: A = Area between the line of perfect equality and the Lorenz curve, B = Area between the Lorenz curve and the line of perfect inequality
formulas.notes: To measure income inequality in South Asian countries

formulas.name: Freedom Score
formulas.variables: PR = Political Rights score, CL = Civil Liberties score
formulas.notes: To evaluate the level of freedom in South Asian countries

formulas.name: Corruption Perception Index (CPI)
formulas.variables: S = Survey score, n = Number of surveys
formulas.notes: To measure the perceived level of corruption in South Asian countries

formulas.name: Global Peace Index (GPI)
formulas.variables: D = Domestic peace score, T = Terrorism score, M = Military expenditure score
formulas.notes: To evaluate the level of peace in South Asian countries

formulas.name: Economic Freedom Index
formulas.variables: S = Score for economic freedom component, n = Number of components
formulas.notes: To measure the level of economic freedom in South Asian countries

formulas.name: Press Freedom Index
formulas.variables: S = Score for press freedom component, n = Number of components
formulas.notes: To evaluate the level of press freedom in South Asian countries

formulas.name: Rule of Law Index
formulas.variables: S = Score for rule of law component, n = Number of components
formulas.notes: To measure the level of rule of law in South Asian countries

formulas.name: Good Governance Index
formulas.variables: S = Score for good governance component, n = Number of components
formulas.notes: To evaluate the level of good governance in South Asian countries
